params.name: Water of Mother River
params.description: Mother River is one of the secrets of the Xiliangnu Kingdom. Anyone drinking the water from it would become pregnant, regardless of man or woman, and give birth to a child in just a few days. Only the water from the Abortion Spring can stop the pregnancy. Thanks to the river, the former state of Xiliangnu was able to thrive in population. A certain famous scripture-seeker from the east almost had his reputation ruined after partaking the river water out of thirst.
